event.description:
The June Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, June 8, from 6pm to 8pm.

This meetup will be hosted by our friends at RichRelevance. Their office is at 275 Battery St. #1150, though we'll be using their 9th floor conference space.

As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome.

Event schedule:

6pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided, courtesy of RichRelevance.
event.title: June 2011 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
